title: schellolepis pallens
intro: Schellolepis pallens, also known as the pale leafless flower or pale leafless grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is a native plant of Western Australia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schellolepis pallens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Schellolepis pallens is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to salves and creams for topical application.
